description: Style NoteRevel in the comfort of soft fabric with this blue Elance hi-cut brief from jockey. The superior fabric provides breathable comfort, while the cut offers easy leg movement. The printed label allows abrasion free comfort and the double layered fly construction offers maximum supportProduct DetailsHi-cut brief designed to Fit excellentlyCarefully styled for optimum support and to provide free leg movementNew high tech, wider cushioned waistband for a smooth and comfortable gripGuaranteed to maintain shape and appearance wash afer washMaterial and Care100% premium combed cotton with magic rib fabricMachine wash delicate at 40 degrees with like colours using a mild detergentDo not bleach, iron or dry cleanTumble dry low
